chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. B. A. No. 831 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 11.09.2025 Syed Muhammad Abdul Kabir and Azhar Ali Golo, advocate a/w applicants Mr. Muhammad Ahmed, Assistant Attorney General a/w SIP Bilal Ahmed FIA CBC Karachi ---------- Counsel for applicant files a Statement attaching certain documents, which is taken on record, and contends that same are available in the police file. He also files diary sheet to show that bail application of co-accused Mst. Shabana has been allowed. Copies are supplied to learned AAG. For the reasons to be recorded later on, ad-interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicants Muhammad Ibrahim son of Shan Bahadur and Muhammad Wajid son of Muhammad Iqbal, vide Order dated 27.03.2025, is hereby confirmed subject to furnishing further solvent surety of Rs.100,000/- each which will be in addition to the solvent surety of Rs.50,000/- already submitted for each applicant (total solvent surety equivalent to Rupees One Lac (Rs.100,000/-) each and PR bonds each in the like amount to be submitted to the Nazir in terms of the Court’s Orders dated 27.03.2025 and the one passed today to the satisfaction of Nazir of this Court. J U D G E Ashraf
